100 Years Ago Today, This is What Was Happening ...

On April 18, 1926, a significant earthquake struck the Kanto region of Japan, causing widespread devastation and loss of life. In Europe, the League of Nations held discussions on disarmament, highlighting ongoing tensions post-World War I. Meanwhile, in the United States, the first radio broadcast of a baseball game was celebrated, marking a new era in sports entertainment.
Updated: Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 07:30:22 AM CDT
